     the Fermi energy is    -0.7039 ev

!    total energy              =   -6614.53599500 Ry
     estimated scf accuracy    <       0.00000002 Ry
     smearing contrib. (-TS)   =      -0.26706844 Ry
     internal energy E=F+TS    =   -6614.26892656 Ry

     The total energy is F=E-TS. E is the sum of the following terms:
     one-electron contribution = -138490.44819106 Ry
     hartree contribution      =   69898.03632715 Ry
     xc contribution           =   -2721.86010377 Ry

     DFT-D3 Dispersion         =      -1.28332033 Ry
